summary: Chain diagram feature fully implemented and verified. 9/9 unit tests pass for renderChainDiagram. TypeScript compiles clean. All acceptance criteria met: TUI command palette, DiagramModal with scroll/copy/Esc, CLI subcommand with proper exit codes, cycle detection, missing task annotation, silent chain [s] marker.
prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence: chain-diagram-ascii

✅ **Passed** — 9/9 unit tests for renderChainDiagram pass. TypeScript clean. All acceptance criteria verified.

### Verified acceptance criteria
- Diagram command appears in loops palette when loop has taskId
- Diagram command absent when loop has no taskId
- DiagramModal opens with scrollable ASCII chain diagram
- Cyclic chains show (cycle) notation
- CLI `diagram <loop-id>` prints to stdout
- CLI handles no-task loop (exit 0) and missing loop (exit 1)
- Missing tasks show (missing task) annotation
- Silent chain tasks marked [s]
